roles.name: Vizier of the Two Lands
roles.description: Highest counsel of the pharaoh — designs the over-arching solution and watches over its integrity across both Upper and Lower Kemet.

roles.name: Overseer of Works
roles.description: Marshals the masons of delivery, holds the inundation timeline, and answers to the temple steward.

roles.name: Scribe of the House of Life
roles.description: Steward of papyrus and seal — records, layouts, fields and permission sets.

roles.name: Master Mason of Saqqara
roles.description: Carves Apex, LWC, and platform features into the limestone of the platform.

roles.name: High Priest of Heliopolis
roles.description: Captain over all sun-temple Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior priests.

roles.name: Priest of the Inner Sanctum
roles.description: Tends the holy of holies — practiced in the deep rites of customer requirement and configuration.

roles.name: Acolyte of Ptah
roles.description: Carries out the daily devotions of discovery and configuration under the inner-sanctum priest's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-builder of the Nile
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the cataracts.

roles.name: Boatwright of the Solar Barque
roles.description: Lays the cedar planks of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-builder's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Boatwright
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the Sobek patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Per-Ankh
roles.description: Tends the wounded code and the weary build — finds the maladies before they reach the pharaoh.

roles.name: Herald of Thoth
roles.description: Lifts the standard and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Chanter of the Procession
roles.description: Strategist of festivals — sounds the call to gather and convert the faithful.

roles.name: Standard-Bearer of the Festival
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily procession.

roles.name: Lector Priest of Iunu
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the divine craft of design.

roles.name: Master Embalmer of Anubis
roles.description: The most senior preserver of code — wraps complex platform features so they endure for eternity.

roles.name: Novice Scribe of Khemenu
roles.description: Just past the apprenticeship — learns the hieroglyphs of declarative configuration.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every pantheon starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Ennead of Heliopolis — Creation Cycle CRM

workstreams.name: Trial in the Hall of Ennead

realms.projectName: Ogdoad of Hermopolis — Primordial Waters Migration
Solar & Creator Gods — Daily Barque Operations
Duat & Protector Gods — Underworld Audit Platform

workstreams.name: Discovery in the Hall of Two Truths
Migrate the Book of the Dead

ennead-of-heliopolis.themedRole: Scribe of the House of Life

solar-and-creator-gods.themedRole: Scribe of the House of Life

ennead-of-heliopolis.name: First Sunrise Sign-off
ennead-of-heliopolis.description: Discovery sign-off — Atum rises from the Nun on the primeval mound.

ennead-of-heliopolis.name: Separation of Sky & Earth
ennead-of-heliopolis.description: Build kickoff: Shu lifts Nut from Geb to make space for the world.

ennead-of-heliopolis.name: Council of the Nine
ennead-of-heliopolis.description: Mid-project gate: stewardship review with the full Ennead.

ennead-of-heliopolis.name: Murder & Resurrection of Osiris
ennead-of-heliopolis.description: Phase invoice trigger: Set's coup, Isis's reassembly — payment milestone.

ennead-of-heliopolis.name: Coronation of Horus
ennead-of-heliopolis.description: Go-Live: the falcon-king takes the throne of the Two Lands.

ennead-of-heliopolis.name: Investiture Hand-off
ennead-of-heliopolis.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the new priesthood.

ogdoad-of-hermopolis.name: Sounding the Primeval Waters
ogdoad-of-hermopolis.description: Project kickoff: the Eight surveyed in the chaos before time.

ogdoad-of-hermopolis.name: Cosmic Egg Laid
ogdoad-of-hermopolis.description: Build phase: the egg of creation set upon the mound.

ogdoad-of-hermopolis.name: Lotus Blooms
ogdoad-of-hermopolis.description: UAT gate: the blue lotus opens — Ra emerges from within.

ogdoad-of-hermopolis.name: Hidden Names Revealed
ogdoad-of-hermopolis.description: Go-Live: the eight true-names committed to the temple archive.

ogdoad-of-hermopolis.name: Eight Return to the Waters
ogdoad-of-hermopolis.description: Hyper-care close: the Ogdoad sink back into Nun's depths.

solar-and-creator-gods.name: Khepri Pushes the Dawn
solar-and-creator-gods.description: Discovery: the scarab rolls the disk above the eastern horizon.

solar-and-creator-gods.name: Forge the Solar Barque
solar-and-creator-gods.description: Build: the Mandjet day-boat completed and rigged.

solar-and-creator-gods.name: Ra's Solution Audit
solar-and-creator-gods.description: Solution review with the sun-god at zenith.

solar-and-creator-gods.name: Daily Crossing Activated
solar-and-creator-gods.description: Go-Live: the barque sails the heavens on a fixed cadence.

solar-and-creator-gods.name: Solar Cult Tally
solar-and-creator-gods.description: Final invoice from the Heliopolitan treasury.

duat-and-protector-gods.name: Anubis's Opening Council
duat-and-protector-gods.description: Kickoff council in the embalming chamber.

duat-and-protector-gods.name: Weighing of the Heart
duat-and-protector-gods.description: Discovery: audit logic modelled against Ma'at's feather.

duat-and-protector-gods.name: Book of the Dead Inscribed
duat-and-protector-gods.description: Build: spell catalogue scribed onto the funerary papyrus.

duat-and-protector-gods.name: Devourer's UAT Acceptance
duat-and-protector-gods.description: UAT acceptance: only worthy hearts pass — Ammit waits below.

duat-and-protector-gods.name: Field of Reeds Go-Live
duat-and-protector-gods.description: Go-Live + handoff: souls cross safely into Aaru.

duat-and-protector-gods.name: Necropolis Final Recompense
duat-and-protector-gods.description: Final invoice from the protectors of the Duat.

Osiris.notes: Annual reassembly retreat — Isis gathering the fourteen pieces.

Set.notes: Desert hunt in the red lands — chasing Apep.

Amun.notes: Hidden-one's silent retreat — name not to be spoken.

Nun.notes: Returning to the primeval waters for quarterly maintenance.

Ra.notes: Solar barque drydock — between night and day shifts.

Ma'at.notes: Feather inspection at the Hall of Two Truths.

Sekhmet.notes: Cooling-down at Philae — beer-and-pomegranate festival to soothe her wrath.

Bastet.notes: Bubastis cat-festival — the great procession down the Nile.
